name: Spicy Papaya Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Diced yellow or red pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice the papaya and mince the jalapeno pepper.
2. Combine the diced papaya and jalapeno with the remaining ingredients: red onion, yellow/red pepper, lime juice, and coriander.
3. Mix everything together to make 3 cups of salsa.
4. This salsa pairs well with grilled or broiled meats, fish, or chicken.
